media.title: Lakers reportedly among teams expected to have meeting with 76ers free agent
media.description: The Los Angeles Lakers reportedly are among multiple teams expected to meet with free agent Kelly Oubre Jr.

items.title: As rumors pick up, a reminder about this video, where I explained in quite a bit of depth how Quentin Grimes and Kelly Oubre Jr.'s free agencies will determine how much spending power the Sixers have when it comes to external free agents. Worth a watch before free agency begins:
